items.title: Economist blames ACT's fiscal deterioration 'entirely' on policy decisions as Barr defends spending
items.summary: An independent economist has laid the blame for the ACT's financial woes at the feet of the government, saying it's "entirely" due to policy decisions. But even he agrees the territory is uniquely challenged in its ability to raise revenue.

items.title: Can you ask a neighbour to remove or trim a large tree for safety or other concerns?
items.summary: Whether you're worried about how old mate's tree next door will hold up in the summer storms, or it's just creating more work for you on the weekend, knowing where you stand can be helpful.

items.title: Man charged with Adelaide Hills assault of father-in-law, who dies from heart attack
items.summary: An Adelaide man who police initially said would be charged with murder has instead appeared in court charged with assault, after a post-mortem examination found the alleged victim died from a heart attack.

items.title: Man dies after being shot by police during welfare check in Brisbane's east
items.summary: Police carrying out a welfare check at a home in Tingalpa shot the 21-year-old man after he allegedly made threats against officers while armed with a knife.

items.title: Matildas star Amy Sayer lauds bravery of Iran players ahead of Asian Cup clash
items.summary: The Matildas are expressing their sympathy while sharing a hotel with Iran's players ahead of this week's crucial Asian Cup clash.

items.title: Police wrongly granted bail to Gold Coast mum Kelly Wilkinson's murderer, inquest hears
items.summary: Queensland Police wrongly granted bail to a man charged with the rape of his estranged wife nine days before he brutally murdered her in 2021, a coronial inquest has heard.

items.title: Tina Arena, Ngaiire reimagine Sia's Unstoppable, open up about life-saving blood donors
items.summary: Music artists Tina Arena and Ngaiire have reimagined Sia's Unstoppable while opening up about how life-saving donated blood brought them back from the brink of serious illness.

items.title: Julian Ingram's court proceedings halted as search for accused triple murderer continues

items.title: Rory Amon sexual assault trial told ex-MP used fake name to 'manipulate a child'

items.summary: A teenage boy accused of driving a stolen vehicle which crashed, killing another teen outside the prime minister's home in Canberra almost two years ago, is found not guilty of manslaughter.

items.title: Australian agriculture hits $100b target four years early but production set to dip next year
